title: Handshake vs Dripify — Honest Comparison for LinkedIn Automation
description: Comparing Handshake and Dripify for LinkedIn automation. Features, pricing, safety, and multi-sender support compared side-by-side to help you choose.

overview.handshake: Handshake is a LinkedIn automation platform purpose-built for multi-sender rotation. Teams manage unlimited LinkedIn accounts from a single dashboard with built-in warmup, a unified inbox, and premium residential proxies on every plan. Pricing scales by sender count — not per seat — starting at $69/month for 1 sender. Every plan includes unlimited team seats and unlimited workspaces, making it the go-to choice for agencies and sales teams running outreach at scale.
overview.competitor: Dripify is a cloud-based LinkedIn automation tool focused on drip campaigns and sequence automation. It's known for its clean interface and easy setup. Dripify charges per user (per LinkedIn account) with three tiers: Basic at $59/mo, Pro at $79/mo, and Advanced at $99/mo. It includes features like automated connection requests, messages, profile visits, skill endorsements, a smart inbox, and email finder capabilities on higher plans.

featureComparison.handshake: Core feature — automatically rotate outreach across multiple LinkedIn accounts
featureComparison.competitor: Not available — each LinkedIn account is a separate subscription with independent campaigns

featureComparison.handshake: Built-in warmup scheduling with gradual ramp-up
featureComparison.competitor: Built-in LinkedIn protection with gradual activity increases

featureComparison.handshake: Single inbox aggregating conversations from all sender accounts
featureComparison.competitor: Dedicated inbox per account (Pro plan and above)

featureComparison.handshake: Unlimited team seats included on every plan
featureComparison.competitor: Team management on Advanced plan ($99/mo per user) — each team member needs their own subscription

featureComparison.handshake: Advanced campaign analytics, acceptance rates, reply tracking across all senders
featureComparison.competitor: Advanced analytics with step-by-step campaign stats, response rates, lead progress tracking

featureComparison.handshake: Premium residential proxies included, human-like patterns, smart rate limiting
featureComparison.competitor: Built-in LinkedIn protection, daily quotas, randomized delays (23% restriction rate reported in independent tests)
Built-in email finder (100 credits/mo on Pro, more on Advanced)
Visual drip campaign builder with multi-step sequences
1 campaign on Basic, unlimited on Pro/Advanced

sections.handshakeWins:
The pricing math tells the story here. Dripify charges per LinkedIn account, which means scaling to 5 or 10 senders gets expensive fast — $495/mo to $990/mo on Dripify vs. $199/mo to $299/mo on Handshake. And that's before factoring in team seats: on Dripify, every person who needs access pays separately. On Handshake, unlimited team seats are included.

Multi-sender rotation is the other decisive factor. Dripify treats each LinkedIn account as an isolated silo — there's no way to distribute a lead list across multiple senders automatically. Handshake was built specifically for this workflow, letting you rotate outreach across accounts to stay under LinkedIn's limits while maximizing reach.

Safety is also notable: independent tests have reported a 23% LinkedIn restriction rate within 90 days for Dripify users. Handshake's premium residential proxies and human-like sending patterns provide stronger account protection.
sections.competitorWins: Dripify has a genuinely lower entry point for solo users — $59/mo on the Basic plan vs. Handshake's $69/mo Solo plan. If you're running one LinkedIn account and want basic automation, Dripify gets you in the door for less. The built-in email finder is a nice touch that Handshake doesn't offer — being able to find verified business emails without a separate tool saves time and money. Dripify's email outreach capability also means you can run LinkedIn + email sequences in one platform. The interface is also notably clean and beginner-friendly, with a shorter learning curve for first-time automation users.
sections.whoShouldChooseHandshake: Choose Handshake if you're running outreach across multiple LinkedIn accounts. It's built for sales teams, agencies, and growth teams who need multi-sender rotation, a unified inbox, and team-friendly pricing. If you're scaling beyond 2-3 senders, Handshake saves you hundreds per month compared to Dripify.
sections.whoShouldChooseCompetitor: Choose Dripify if you're a solo user looking for the lowest entry price with basic LinkedIn automation. It's also a good fit if you want built-in email finding and email+LinkedIn multichannel sequences in a single tool, and you don't need multi-sender rotation.
sections.verdict: Dripify is a solid entry-level LinkedIn automation tool with a clean interface and useful extras like email finding. But its per-account pricing model breaks down quickly for teams. At just 5 senders, you're paying $300+ more per month than Handshake — and you still don't get multi-sender rotation or a unified inbox. For anyone scaling LinkedIn outreach beyond a single account, Handshake is the smarter investment.

faqs.question: Is Handshake cheaper than Dripify for teams?
faqs.answer: Yes. Handshake's Growth plan gives you 5 senders for $199/mo with unlimited team seats. Dripify would cost $395-$495/mo for 5 accounts (depending on which tier), plus each team member needs their own paid seat.

faqs.question: Does Dripify have multi-sender rotation?
faqs.answer: No. Each Dripify subscription is tied to one LinkedIn account with independent campaigns. There's no built-in way to rotate outreach across multiple senders.

faqs.question: Is Dripify safe for my LinkedIn account?
faqs.answer: Dripify includes safety features like daily quotas and randomized delays. However, independent testing has reported a 23% restriction rate within 90 days. Handshake uses premium residential proxies and more conservative sending patterns for stronger protection.

faqs.question: Does Handshake have an email finder like Dripify?
faqs.answer: No, Handshake is focused on LinkedIn automation. For email finding, you can pair Handshake with dedicated tools like Apollo, Hunter, or Snov.io for better results and more credits.

faqs.question: Can I migrate from Dripify to Handshake?
faqs.answer: Yes. Simply connect your LinkedIn accounts to Handshake and set up your campaigns. There's no complex migration — most teams are up and running within a few hours.
